name: Purchase Base On Branch عياش
report_script:
def execute(filters=None):
    if not filters:
        filters = {}

    columns = [
        {"label": "كود الصنف", "fieldname": "item_code", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Item", "width": 150},
        {"label": "اسم الصنف", "fieldname": "item_name", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 200},
        {"label": "مركز التكلفة", "fieldname": "cost_center", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Cost Center", "width": 150},
        {"label": "إجمالي الكمية", "fieldname": "total_qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 120},
        {"label": "إجمالي القيمة", "fieldname": "total_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 150},
    ]

    data = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            pii.item_code,
            pii.item_name,
            pi.cost_center,
            SUM(pii.qty) AS total_qty,
            SUM(pii.amount) AS total_amount
        FROM
            `tabPurchase Invoice Item` pii
        JOIN
            `tabPurchase Invoice` pi ON pi.name = pii.parent
        WHERE
            pi.docstatus = 1
            AND pi.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
            AND pi.cost_center = %(cost_center)s
        GROUP BY
            pii.item_code, pi.cost_center
        ORDER BY
            pi.cost_center, pii.item_code
    """, filters, as_dict=True)

    return columns, data

name: Report Purchase Base On Branch
query:
SELECT
    pi_item.item_code AS "كود الصنف:Link/Item:150",
    pi_item.item_name AS "اسم الصنف:Data:200",
    pi.cost_center AS "مركز التكلفة:Link/Cost Center:150",
    SUM(pi_item.qty) AS "إجمالي الكمية:Float:120",
    SUM(pi_item.amount) AS "إجمالي القيمة:Currency:150"
FROM
    `tabPurchase Invoice Item` AS pi_item
JOIN
    `tabPurchase Invoice` AS pi
    ON pi.name = pi_item.parent
WHERE
    pi.docstatus = 1
    AND pi.cost_center = 'عياش الخبر - ayash'
GROUP BY
    pi_item.item_code,
    pi.cost_center
ORDER BY
    pi.cost_center,
    pi_item.item_code
report_script:
def execute(filters=None):
    filters = filters or {}

    cost_center = filters.get("cost_center")

    conditions = ""
    values = {}

    if cost_center:
        conditions += "AND pii.cost_center = %(cost_center)s "
        values["cost_center"] = cost_center

    data = frappe.db.sql(f"""
        SELECT
            pii.item_code AS "كود الصنف",
            pii.item_name AS "اسم الصنف",
            pii.cost_center AS "مركز التكلفة",
            SUM(pii.qty) AS "إجمالي الكمية",
            SUM(pii.amount) AS "إجمالي القيمة"
        FROM `tabPurchase Invoice Item` pii
        INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice` pi ON pi.name = pii.parent
        WHERE pi.docstatus = 1
        {conditions}
        GROUP BY pii.item_code, pii.cost_center
        ORDER BY pii.cost_center, pii.item_code
    """, values, as_dict=True)

    return data

name: Report Purchase Invoice VS  Purchase Receipt
report_name: Report Purchase Invoice VS  Purchase Receipt
query: SELECT pi.name AS "Purchase Invoice:Link/Purchase Invoice:200", pi.supplier AS "Supplier:Link/Supplier:300", pi.company AS "Company:Link/Company:110", pii.item_code AS "Item:Link/Item:150", pii.qty AS "Qty:Float:80", pii.amount AS "Amount:Currency:150", CASE WHEN pri.receipt_qty IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Purchase Receipt:HTML:150", IFNULL(pri.receipt_qty, 0) AS "Qty Received:Float:120", CASE WHEN pi.update_stock = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Update Stock:HTML:150" FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` pi JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice Item` pii ON pi.name = pii.parent LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pri.item_code, pri.purchase_invoice, pri.purchase_order, SUM(pri.qty) AS receipt_qty FROM `tabPurchase Receipt Item` pri WHERE pri.purchase_invoice IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pri.purchase_invoice, pri.item_code ) pri ON pri.purchase_invoice = pi.name AND pri.item_code = pii.item_code WHERE pi.docstatus = 1 ORDER BY pi.posting_date DESC;

name: Report Sales Invoice VS  Delivery Note
report_name: Report Sales Invoice VS  Delivery Note
query:
SELECT
    si.name AS "Sales Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:160",
    si.customer_name AS "Customer Name::160",
    sii.item_name AS "Item Name::160",
    sii.qty AS "Invoiced Qty:Float:160",
    sii.amount AS "Amount:Currency:160",
    IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(dni.qty)
        FROM `tabDelivery Note Item` dni
        WHERE dni.against_sales_invoice = si.name
          AND dni.item_code = sii.item_code
    ), 0) AS "Delivered Qty:Float:160",
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL((
            SELECT SUM(dni.qty)
            FROM `tabDelivery Note Item` dni
            WHERE dni.against_sales_invoice = si.name
              AND dni.item_code = sii.item_code
        ), 0) = 0 THEN 'Not Delivered'
        WHEN IFNULL((
            SELECT SUM(dni.qty)
            FROM `tabDelivery Note Item` dni
            WHERE dni.against_sales_invoice = si.name
              AND dni.item_code = sii.item_code
        ), 0) < sii.qty THEN 'Partially Delivered'
        WHEN IFNULL((
            SELECT SUM(dni.qty)
            FROM `tabDelivery Note Item` dni
            WHERE dni.against_sales_invoice = si.name
              AND dni.item_code = sii.item_code
        ), 0) >= sii.qty THEN 'Fully Delivered'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS "Delivery Status::160"
FROM
    `tabSales Invoice` si
JOIN
    `tabSales Invoice Item` sii ON sii.parent = si.name
WHERE
    si.docstatus = 1
ORDER BY
    si.posting_date DESC, si.name DESC;
